sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87888" key="prokune/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκῠνέω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κύων</etym>) of a dog, <sense id="n87888.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give tongue too soon,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
